properties.description:
Satellites/Sensors used to generate this product this product include:
    ERS: European Space Agency Earth Remote Sensing Satellites 1 and 2
    RSAT: RADARSAT-1 — Canadian Space Agency Synthetic Aperture Radar
    Satellite
    R2: RADARSAT-2 — Canadian Space Agency Synthetic Aperture Radar
    Satellite
    PALSAR: Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency Advanced Land Observing
    System (ALOS) Phased Array type L-band Synthetic Aperture Radar
    COSMO SkyMed: Italian Space Agency Synthetic Aperture Radar
    Constellation
    Sentinel-1A: European Union and European Space Agency Copernicus
    program Synthetic Aperture Radar Satellite

data.title: Grounding line positions Parquet
data.proj:wkt2: GEOGCRS["WGS 84",ENSEMBLE["World Geodetic System 1984 ensemble",MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (Transit)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G730)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G873)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G1150)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G1674)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G1762)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G2139)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G2296)"],ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],ENSEMBLEACCURACY[2.0]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["geodetic latitude (Lat)",north,ORDER[1],ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],AXIS["geodetic longitude (Lon)",east,ORDER[2],ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],USAGE[SCOPE["Horizontal component of 3D system."],AREA["World."],BBOX[-90,-180,90,180]],ID["EPSG",4326]]

parquet:columns.name: SENSOR
parquet:columns.description: Name of the satellite sensor used to generate the measurement.

parquet:columns.name: ORBIT1
parquet:columns.description: Absolute orbit number for the first synthetic aperture radar (SAR) acquisition.

parquet:columns.name: DATE1
parquet:columns.description: Date of the first SAR acquisition.

parquet:columns.name: ORBIT2
parquet:columns.description: Absolute orbit number for the second synthetic aperture radar (SAR) acquisition.

parquet:columns.name: DATE2
parquet:columns.description: Date of the second SAR acquisition.

parquet:columns.name: ORBIT3
parquet:columns.description: Absolute orbit number for the third synthetic aperture radar (SAR) acquisition.

parquet:columns.name: DATE3
parquet:columns.description: Date of the third SAR acquisition.

parquet:columns.name: ORBIT4
parquet:columns.description: Absolute orbit number for the fourth synthetic aperture radar (SAR) acquisition (if applicable).

parquet:columns.name: DATE4
parquet:columns.description: Date of the fourth SAR acquisition (if applicable).

parquet:columns.name: geometry
parquet:columns.description: Spatial MultiLineString geometry mapping the grounding line position.
